title: "Compiz-Fusion: Autohide panels stuck"

### Post by abrichr on 2007-07-17
I'm using Gnome, and have a panel on each side of the screen set to autohide, which works no problem when metacity is running.  When I enable compiz, these panels become stuck, and I cannot view them.  I'm using an Nvidia GeForce Go 7600.  Not sure what else is relevant.  

My xorg.conf:


### Post by viderporst on 2007-12-29
The problem might be, that compiz steals the mouse input, because display corners and sides can be used as triggers for compiz actions, just like hotkeys.

If that's your problem, try moving your mouse at least 1 pixel off the display edge, wait a second, then your panels shoud slide in.

I had that problem once on Debian, with a developer version of compiz, and corrected it by switching off the desktop edge "button" functionality (can remeber the option's name) in compiz's config manager. Couldn't find it in Ubuntu's build though. If one of you finds it, please tell me. Aiming the cursor on a 5 pixel wide area get's annoying.

Mahlzeit!

viderporst

---

### Post by KingCharles on 2008-03-29
I used to have the same problem when I enabled compiz.
The way I worked around it was, to turn off all of the "Screen Edge" values on EVERY plug-in. Unfortunately there is no "master switch" that I know of, and since I do not like screen edges myself, this workaround works for me.

---

### Post by viderporst on 2008-03-30
The problem is, when a loaded plugin has a turned off function, that is set to use an edge event, compiz "grabs" the mouse in the vicinity of that edge, but doesn't do anything. In my case, it was the "Desktop Board" (translated from german: "Desktop Tafel", i'm not sure what it's called in english) plugin's "Move Window to Desktop" and "Darg and Drop" functions, which were turned off, but had the edge associated to them.

[COLOR="Red"]**Unchecking the edge in _EVERY_ plugin will solve this.**[/COLOR]

---

### Post by wojnicki on 2008-04-03
I had the same problem, disabling: Desktop Wall/Edge Flip DnD helps :)

---

### Post by Deeta on 2008-05-19
Just wanted to note that I have the same problem.

Is there a launchbad bug for this already?
